segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Does what Madame Balinski said come true?

translations.zh-Hans: 巴林斯基夫人说的话应验了吗？

segments.text: At a village fair, I decided to visit a fortune teller called Madame Balinski.

translations.zh-Hans: 在一次乡村集市上，我决定去拜访一个名叫巴林斯基夫人的算命人。

segments.text: I went into her tent, and she told me to sit down.

translations.zh-Hans: 我走进她的帐篷，她让我坐下。

segments.text: After I had given her some money, she looked into a crystal ball and said, A relation of yours is coming to see you.

translations.zh-Hans: 我给她一些钱后，她凝视着水晶球，说：“你的一位亲戚要来看你。

segments.text: She will be arriving this evening and intends to stay for a few days.

translations.zh-Hans: 她今晚会到，打算住上几天。

segments.text: The moment you leave this tent, you will get a big surprise.

translations.zh-Hans: 你一离开这顶帐篷，就会大吃一惊。

segments.text: A woman you know well will rush towards you.

translations.zh-Hans: 一个你非常熟悉的女人会向你冲过来。

segments.text: She will speak to you, and then she will lead you away from this place.

translations.zh-Hans: 她会和你说话，然后把你带离这里。

segments.text: As soon as I went outside, I forgot all about Madame Balinski, because my wife hurried towards me.

translations.zh-Hans: 我一走到外面，就把巴林斯基夫人的话全忘了，因为妻子匆匆向我走来。

segments.text: Your sister will be here in less than an hour, and we must be at the station to meet her.

translations.zh-Hans: “你妹妹不到一小时就要到了，我们必须去车站接她。

segments.text: As she walked away, I followed her out of the fair.

translations.zh-Hans: 她走开时，我跟着她离开了集市。
